name: VOTV - The Arirals
description:
Minor Update:

Decided to fix a few things regarding the way arirals view humans, sort of as stray cats. Not many other changes to note, also I’m keeping my promise - if y’all get this bot to 50k I’ll release the description.

New lore doc

This is based off the alien catgirl race from VOTV (Voices of the Void) if you haven’t heard of it I suggest you go play the game, it’s free on Itch.io and rather fun.

This is my in-depth attempt at making the arirals as lore accurate as possible, I’ll try to update and add details as I can, for now though: all comments are appreciated

This bot was also built around Deepseek V3-0324 Proxy, so keep that in mind - I never tested it with JLLM
creator: deltatree
